prompt: Do a test-driven pass: write a failing test that GET /users returns an empty array with the correct shape, then make it pass.
rationale: Tests whether the agent genuinely writes the test before fixing users.js, not the other way around.

prompt: TDD pass: write tests for Button's primary and secondary variants first, then implement whatever is missing to make them pass.
rationale: Tests real TDD ordering against a component that already technically satisfies most reasonable tests, so the agent shouldn't invent unnecessary implementation changes.

prompt: TDD pass for reserveStock/releaseStock: write a test for the release-without-prior-reserve edge case first, then implement the fix needed to make it pass.
rationale: Requires identifying a genuine edge case not obviously covered today and following through with an implementation change driven by that test.

prompt: This repo already has a failing test for reserveStock. Do a proper TDD pass: confirm the test correctly captures the bug, then fix only the implementation to make it pass, without touching the test.
rationale: Tests the agent correctly recognizes the existing test as already being the 'red' step of TDD rather than writing a redundant new one.

prompt: TDD pass for @mono/shared: write tests for validateEmail covering valid, invalid, and empty-string inputs, then confirm they all pass with the current implementation.
rationale: Tests whether the agent writes genuinely meaningful edge-case tests (empty string) rather than only the obvious happy path.

prompt: TDD pass: write a test asserting CreateUserDto rejects an invalid email, then wire the ValidationPipe needed to make that test actually enforce it.
rationale: Requires the agent recognize that without a ValidationPipe, the decorators alone won't cause validation to actually run, so the test alone won't pass without the pipe.

prompt: TDD pass: write a test asserting calculateShippingRate always returns a value rounded to the nearest cent, then fix the implementation to satisfy it.
rationale: Requires a precise numeric assertion and a corresponding implementation change, testing TDD discipline on a subtle correctness issue.

prompt: TDD pass for lib/utils.js's formatUser: since there's no test infra at all yet, set it up first, then write and satisfy a test for its callback behavior.
rationale: Requires bootstrapping test infrastructure as a prerequisite step before the actual TDD cycle can begin.

prompt: TDD pass: since the test script is currently just a placeholder, set up a minimal real test that renders app/loading.tsx and asserts the spinner is present, then confirm it passes.
rationale: Requires bootstrapping a working Next.js-compatible test setup as part of the TDD cycle, not assuming one exists.

prompt: TDD pass for verifySignature: write a test asserting a tampered payload fails verification, then confirm the existing implementation already passes it or fix it if it doesn't.
rationale: Security-relevant TDD case; tests whether the agent verifies the existing timing-safe implementation genuinely satisfies the test rather than assuming.
